nasb.text: Then the second lot fell to Simeon, to the tribe of the sons of Simeon according to their families, and their inheritance was in the midst of the inheritance of the sons of Judah.

esv.text: The second lot came out for Simeon, for the tribe of the people of Simeon, according to their clans, and their inheritance was in the midst of the inheritance of the people of Judah.

cnv.text: 為西緬，就是為西緬支派，按著家族抽出第二籤；他們的產業是在猶大人的產業中間。

ccb.text: 西缅支派按宗族得到第二签，所得的产业在犹大人的疆界内，
